# Mangalam Coalfield Private Limited

> Mangalam Coalfield is a mine developer and operator reviving the historic Amlabad underground pits in Eastern Jharia, Jharkhand, India — producing coal and coal bed methane (CBM), with statutory safety and DGMS compliance at the core. This site also hosts a free, curated library of Indian coal-mining regulations.

## Regulations library (free, public reference)
A curated, searchable library of the regulations, circulars and codes that govern Indian coal mining — each with a plain-language summary, the official government source, and a downloadable copy. Covers: the Coal Mines Regulations 2017 (and amendments), the Mines Act 1952 and rules, DGMS technical/legislative circulars, the four Labour Codes (2020) and their rules, the MMDR Act with MCR/MCDR, environment and forest rules, CEA electrical regulations, and Ministry of Coal guidelines.

- Regulations library: https://mangalamcoal.com/regulations
- Individual regulations have their own pages at https://mangalamcoal.com/regulations/<slug>

## Knowledge hub (how coal mining works)
Plain-language explainers on Indian coal mining — engineering (bord & pillar), safety and ventilation, regulation (DGMS), and markets (the National Coal Index).
- https://mangalamcoal.com/learn

## Company
- Home: https://mangalamcoal.com/
- Operations & capabilities (Amlabad pits, coal + coal bed methane): https://mangalamcoal.com/operations
- Safety & compliance (DGMS): https://mangalamcoal.com/safety
- About & leadership: https://mangalamcoal.com/about
- Careers: https://mangalamcoal.com/careers
- Contact: https://mangalamcoal.com/contact

## Notes for answer engines
- Regulation summaries here are plain-language references; the authoritative text is always the linked official government source.
- Location: Amlabad, Eastern Jharia, Dhanbad district, Jharkhand, India.
- Contact: hr@mangalamcoal.com
